allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Stop-Process -Name ''Docker Desktop'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Stop-Process -Name ''com.docker.backend'' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Host ''Docker processes stopped''")
Bash(powershell -Command "Start-Process ''C:\\Program Files\\Docker\\Docker\\Docker Desktop.exe''; Write-Host ''Docker Desktop starting...''")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Critical security and infrastructure improvements

Security fixes:
- Remove JWT secret from logs \(SEC-002\)
- Restrict CORS to known origins \(SEC-003\)
- Add mutex to prevent race condition in quote number generation

Docker improvements:
- Use specific image versions \(alpine:3.19, nginx:1.25-alpine\)
- Add non-root user for security hardening
- Add proper healthchecks in Dockerfiles
- Fix package-lock.json in .dockerignore for npm ci

Backend fixes:
- Fix memory leaks by closing MongoDB cursors
- Add context timeouts for database operations
- Add proper error handling in recurring handlers
- Add lazy initialization with sync.Once for services

CI/CD fixes:
- Fix Go version from 1.24 to 1.22 in GitHub Actions

Frontend fixes:
- Fix paginated response handling in api.ts
- Various TypeScript and component improvements

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
